title: The Battle of al-Walajah / i g About Ullays, Which Is on the Euphrates Itself/ zi The Affair of Amghishiya / z6 The Day of al-Maqr and the Mouth of Furat Badagla / z6 What Happened after al-Hirah
description: The Battle of al-Walajah / i g About Ullays, Which Is on the Euphrates Itself/ zi The Affair of Amghishiya / z6 The Day of al-Maqr and the Mouth of Furat Badagla / z6 What Happened after al-Hirah. Recorded under the year 13 AH (634–635 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 11.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 11
